summary: Iteration 2 testing complete — all v2 enhancements verified end-to-end. Backend: 10/10 pytest pass (status endpoints + new /api/leads CRUD with success, validation, list-sort-no-_id). Frontend: meta/OG tags present, og-image.svg & favicon return 200, hero+final jotform CTAs now point to #apply, navbar+mobile 'Apply' nav links scroll to #apply, VideoIntro section renders with play button + 'coming soon' note, LeadForm submission succeeds end-to-end (form swap to success block with 'Got it. Talk soon.' headline + Calendly CTA), DB persistence confirmed via GET /api/leads, email_status='skipped' as expected (Resend gracefully no-op'd). Existing functionality intact: 4 hero stats, 12 deliverables, 4 weekly phase cards, naixol IG link, FAQ accordion expand, mobile menu toggle. Zero console errors. TEST_ leads + status_checks cleaned up post-test.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py correctly excludes MongoDB _id via projection {_id:0} on both /api/leads and /api/status — good.
Lead model uses EmailStr (proper 422 on invalid emails) and uuid id + timezone-aware created_at ISO string in DB — solid.

_send_lead_email gracefully returns 'skipped' when RESEND_API_KEY is placeholder OR when NOTIFICATION_EMAIL missing; failures captured + persisted to email_status without breaking the POST flow — good defensive design.
Minor: NOTIFICATION_EMAIL is hardcoded to a personal gmail in .env; acceptable per problem statement but flag for production hardening.
Minor: VideoIntro.jsx uses an external Pexels image as placeholder background — same pattern as Hero (already noted iteration_1). Not blocking.
LeadForm uses axios POST directly to ${REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL}/api/leads and properly strips empty optional fields before submit — clean.
Note: review_request mentioned 'sorted desc by created_at' for GET /api/leads — verified pass (list_leads sorts by created_at -1 in Mongo).
seed_data_creation: Created 4 TEST_-prefixed leads (qa.lead@, min.lead@, list.probe@, qa.frontend.lead+e2e@) and 2 TEST_-prefixed status checks during testing. ALL CLEANED UP at end of run via motor delete_many on regex ^TEST_ — leads collection now contains 0 docs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test files: /app/backend/tests/test_status_api.py (4 tests) + /app/backend/tests/test_leads_api.py (6 tests). Resend email is intentionally MOCKED/disabled — RESEND_API_KEY in /app/backend/.env is a placeholder string starting with 'placeholder', so EMAIL_ENABLED=False and _send_lead_email returns 'skipped'. Do NOT flag email_status='skipped' as a bug. Public URL: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://expert-led-courses.preview.emergentagent.com. Mobile nav toggle testid is 'navbar-mobile-toggle' (not 'mobile-menu-toggle'). All 14 review_request items verified passing.
